items.name: apply_inplace
items.doc: Apply a circuit to a quantum state in-place using efficient instruct functions.

items.name: apply
items.doc: Apply a circuit to a quantum state, returning a new state.

items.name: indicator
items.doc: Return an integer with the k-th bit set to 1 (0-indexed).

items.name: bmask
items.doc: Return a bitmask with bits set at the given positions (0-indexed).

items.name: bmask_range
items.doc: Return a bitmask for a contiguous range [start, stop) of bit positions.

items.name: flip
items.doc: XOR flip bits at masked positions.

items.name: anyone
items.doc: Return true if any bit at masked position is 1.

items.name: allone
items.doc: Return true if all bits at masked positions are 1.

items.name: ismatch
items.doc: Return true if bits at masked positions equal target.

items.name: IterControl
items.doc: Iterator for controlled subspace of bits.

items.name: itercontrol
items.doc: Create an IterControl that iterates through the controlled subspace.

items.name: group_shift
items.doc: Compute masks and shift factors for IterControl.

items.name: Annotation
items.doc: Annotation variants for circuit visualization.

items.name: PositionedAnnotation
items.doc: An annotation placed at a specific qubit location.

items.name: PositionedChannel
items.doc: A noise channel placed at specific qubit locations.

items.name: CircuitElement
items.doc: Elements that can appear in a circuit sequence.

items.name: CircuitError
items.doc: Error types for circuit validation.

items.name: PositionedGate
items.doc: A gate placed at specific locations in a circuit.

items.name: Circuit
items.doc: A quantum circuit consisting of positioned gates and annotations on a register of qudits.

items.name: put
items.doc: Place a gate on target locations (no controls).

items.name: control
items.doc: Place a controlled gate with active-high control (all controls trigger on |1⟩).

items.name: channel
items.doc: Place a noise channel at specific qubit locations.

items.name: label
items.doc: Place a text label annotation on a qubit wire.

items.name: pair_ring
items.doc: Ring entanglement layout: [(0,1), (1,2), ..., (n-2,n-1), (n-1,0)]

items.name: pair_square
items.doc: Square lattice on m x n grid. Returns pairs of (row-major index, row-major index).

items.name: qft_circuit
items.doc: Build an n-qubit QFT circuit.

items.name: general_u2
items.doc: General single-qubit gate: Rz(theta3) * Ry(theta2) * Rz(theta1), positioned on `qubit`.

items.name: general_u4
items.doc: General two-qubit SU(4) decomposition (15 params), on qubits qubit0, qubit0+1.

items.name: variational_circuit
items.doc: Hardware-efficient variational circuit. All rotation angles = 0.

items.name: hadamard_test_circuit
items.doc: Hadamard test circuit. N+1 qubits (qubit 0 = ancilla).

items.name: swap_test_circuit
items.doc: Swap test circuit. nstate*nbit+1 qubits (qubit 0 = ancilla).

items.name: phase_estimation_circuit
items.doc: Phase estimation circuit. n_reg + n_b qubits.

items.name: rand_supremacy2d
items.doc: Build a random supremacy circuit on an nx x ny qubit grid with given depth.

items.name: rand_google53
items.doc: Build a random Google-53 (Sycamore-style) circuit.

items.name: TensorNetwork
items.doc: A tensor network representation of a quantum circuit.

items.name: circuit_to_einsum
items.doc: Convert a quantum circuit into a tensor network (einsum) representation.

items.name: circuit_to_overlap
items.doc: Convert circuit to tensor network for ⟨0|U|0⟩ (overlap with zero state)

items.name: circuit_to_einsum_with_boundary
items.doc: Convert a quantum circuit into a tensor network with boundary conditions.

items.name: circuit_to_expectation
items.doc: Convert circuit to tensor network for computing expectation value ⟨0|U†OU|0⟩

items.name: TensorNetworkDM
items.doc: Tensor network with i32 labels for density matrix mode.

items.name: circuit_to_einsum_dm
items.doc: Convert a circuit to a density matrix tensor network.

items.name: circuit_to_expectation_dm
items.doc: Compute expectation value tr(O * rho) in density matrix mode.

items.name: Gate
items.doc: Quantum gate enum supporting named qubit gates and custom gates.

items.name: mixed_radix_index
items.doc: Convert site indices to flat state vector index using row-major ordering.

items.name: linear_to_indices
items.doc: Decompose a flat index into site indices using row-major ordering.

items.name: iter_basis
items.doc: Iterate over all computational basis states.

items.name: iter_basis_fixed
items.doc: Iterate over basis states with fixed values at certain sites.

items.name: insert_index
items.doc: Insert a value at a location in site indices.

items.name: u1rows
items.doc: Apply a 2x2 unitary gate to a pair of amplitudes at indices i and j.

items.name: udrows
items.doc: Apply a d x d unitary gate to d amplitudes at given indices.

items.name: mulrow
items.doc: Multiply an amplitude at index i by a scalar factor.

items.name: instruct_single
items.doc: Apply a general d x d gate at a single site location.

items.name: instruct_controlled
items.doc: Apply a controlled gate to target sites when control sites have specified values.

items.name: instruct_diagonal
items.doc: Apply a diagonal gate at a single site location.

items.name: instruct_1q
items.doc: Apply single-qubit gate to state vector using stride-based iteration.

items.name: instruct_1q_diag
items.doc: Apply single-qubit diagonal gate diag(d0, d1) using stride-based iteration.

items.name: instruct_2q
items.doc: Apply 2-qubit 4x4 gate using itercontrol-based iteration.

items.name: instruct_2q_diag
items.doc: Apply 2-qubit diagonal gate diag(d0, d1, d2, d3).

items.name: instruct_1q_controlled
items.doc: Apply controlled single-qubit gate.

items.name: instruct_2q_controlled
items.doc: Apply controlled 2-qubit gate.

items.name: instruct_1q_diag_controlled
items.doc: Apply controlled 1-qubit diagonal gate.

items.name: instruct_2q_diag_controlled
items.doc: Apply controlled 2-qubit diagonal gate.

items.name: circuit_to_json
items.doc: Serialize a Circuit to a pretty-printed JSON string.

items.name: circuit_from_json
items.doc: Deserialize a Circuit from a JSON string.

items.name: probs
items.doc: Compute probability distribution over computational basis.

items.name: measure
items.doc: Sample measurement outcomes without collapsing state.

items.name: measure_and_collapse
items.doc: Measure and collapse state to the measured outcome.

items.name: collapse_to
items.doc: Collapse state to a specific outcome (post-selection).

items.name: measure_reset
items.doc: Measure specified qudits and reset them to a given value.

items.name: measure_remove
items.doc: Measure specified qudits and remove them from the state.

items.name: NoiseChannel
items.doc: Quantum noise channel types.

items.name: Op
items.doc: Single-site operator (Pauli basis + projectors)

items.name: OperatorString
items.doc: Product of operators at different sites: Z(0)Z(1)

items.name: op_matrix
items.doc: Get 2x2 matrix for operator

items.name: OperatorPolynomial
items.doc: Linear combination of operator strings: Σ cᵢ·Oᵢ

items.name: Leg
items.doc: Leg descriptor for tensor network labeling.

items.name: gate_to_tensor
items.doc: Convert a PositionedGate to a tensor and its leg descriptors.
